title: S + had better + V / S + ought to + V

formulas.zh: 主詞最好（不要）做某事（帶有警告或不利後果的建議）
主詞應該做某事（表義務、應然或道德責任）

explanation: had better 與 ought to 都是助動詞用法，後接原形動詞，無人稱變化。had better 語氣較強，帶有警告意味，暗示不照做會有負面後果；ought to 表示道德義務、應然責任或期望，語氣較溫和。兩者都可用 not 形成否定，had better not 和 ought not to 都正確。學測常混淆 had better 與 should，需注意前者語氣更強。

examples.eng: You had better finish your homework before watching TV.
examples.chi: 你最好先完成功課再看電視。

examples.eng: Students ought to respect their teachers and classmates.
examples.chi: 學生應該尊重他們的老師和同學。

examples.eng: You had better not be late for the exam tomorrow.
examples.chi: 你最好明天考試不要遲到。

examples.eng: Everyone ought to care about environmental protection.
examples.chi: 每個人都應該關心環境保護。

extension.tip: had better 的 had 不是過去式，而是助動詞的一部分，整體仍表現在或未來建議。ought to 有時可縮寫為 ought，但正式用法保留 to。兩者都不用加 -s，即使主詞是第三人稱單數。注意 had better 後不加 to，常見錯誤為 had better to do。

examples.test: ✗ You had better to study hard.
examples.result: → ○ You had better study hard.（had better 後直接接原形，不加 to）

examples.test: ✗ He ought study for the test.
examples.result: → ○ He ought to study for the test.（ought to 中的 to 不可省略）
→ ○ She ought not to study there.（ought 的否定應為 ought not to）

extension.note: had better 帶警告（不做有後果），ought to 表義務（道德或責任）；記住 had better 後無 to，ought to 後必有 to。

parts: If you want to succeed, you
exercises.sentence: If you want to succeed, you had better work hard every day.
exercises.translation: 如果你想成功，你最好每天努力工作。

parts: obey the laws of their country.
exercises.sentence: All citizens ought to obey the laws of their country.
exercises.translation: 所有公民都應該遵守他們國家的法律。

parts: not miss this important meeting tomorrow.
exercises.sentence: You had better not miss this important meeting tomorrow.
exercises.translation: 你最好明天不要缺席這個重要會議。

parts: take responsibility for their own future.
exercises.sentence: Young people ought to take responsibility for their own future.
exercises.translation: 年輕人應該為自己的未來負責。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 警告朋友不要遲到，語氣較強。
mc_exercises.question_eng: You _______ be late for the meeting, or the boss will be angry.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A「had better not」。had better 語氣強烈且帶有警告意味，表示不照做會有負面後果（老闆會生氣），符合題意。B 項「ought not to」語氣較溫和，用於道德責任；C 項「should not」語氣也溫和；D 項「had not better」文法錯誤，had better 的否定形式是 had better not，not 不能置於 had 之後。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 表達對學生的期望與道德責任。
mc_exercises.question_eng: Students _______ arrive on time and listen carefully in class.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B「ought to」。ought to 表示道德義務、應然責任或期望，語氣溫和，適合表達對學生的期望與要求。A 項「had better」語氣過強且帶有警告；C 項「had to」表強制義務，語氣不適；D 項「should to」文法錯誤，should 後直接加原形動詞，不加 to。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 表示必須立即行動，否則會有嚴重後果。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The patient _______ take this medicine immediately, or his condition will worsen.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 C「had better」。句中強調必須立即行動且帶有警告（condition will worsen），had better 語氣最強且暗示負面後果，最符合此情境。A 項「should」語氣較溫和；B 項「ought to」表責任而非緊急警告；D 項「is supposed to」表被期望，但語氣不如 had better 強烈。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 判斷兩個句子中 had better 與 ought to 的區別用法。
mc_exercises.question_eng: Which pair of sentences correctly uses both 'had better' and 'ought to'? (1) You _______ study hard, or you'll fail the exam. (2) Citizens _______ follow traffic rules for everyone's safety.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B。句(1)「You _______ study hard, or you'll fail」帶有警告（否則會不及格），需用 had better，語氣強烈。句(2)「Citizens _______ follow traffic rules for everyone's safety」表社會責任與義務，用 ought to 較適合。A 項反向；C、D 項皆為同一用法，無法區分兩者語氣差異，不符學測考點。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 你最好立刻完成你的家庭作業。
translation_exercises.answer: You had better finish your homework immediately.
key_points: had better 表示強烈建議
hints: 句型：S + had better + V（原形），語氣帶有警告意味
常見錯誤：不要加 to（❌ had better to finish），不要用過去式（❌ had finished）

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 學生們應該尊重他們的老師。
translation_exercises.answer: Students ought to respect their teachers.
key_points: ought to 表示道德義務
主詞複數時助動詞無變化
hints: 句型：S + ought to + V（原形），語氣溫和，強調應然責任
注意：ought to 的否定形式是 ought not to（❌ oughtn't to 在正式英文中較少用）

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 他最好不要在考試時作弊，否則會被處分。
translation_exercises.answer: He had better not cheat on the exam, or he will be punished.
key_points: had better not 構成否定
後接 or 子句說明負面後果
hints: 句型：S + had better not + V（原形），否定形式直接加 not，不需要 do not
had better 常與後果相連，強調「如果不這樣做會很糟糕」的警告語氣

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 年輕人應該為他們的未來著想，並且不應該浪費時間在無意義的事情上。
translation_exercises.answer: Young people ought to think about their future, and they ought not to waste time on meaningless things.
key_points: ought to 與 ought not to 並用
複句結構連接兩個義務陳述
hints: 句型：可在並列句中重複使用 S + ought to + V，強調多項責任與期望
注意：ought not to 的否定較正式，也可用 ought to + not + V，但前者更常見；避免混淆 had better 與 ought to 的語氣差異（前者強烈警告，後者溫和義務）
